data.name: 梦幻旋律
data.detailed_description:
patch

Game with a patch is sweet.

Press "K" and "C" on the login screen. You will reap sweet fruit.


關於此遊戲

"Dream Rhythm" is an addictive rhythm game.
Simple operation, beautiful songs, bring you a dreamy flow experience.

Game features

10 beautiful songs
Including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian and English. Multiple styles, different experiences.

Simple operation
Only 2 buttons are needed to play the game. Anyone can get started quickly.

Each song contains 3 difficulties
Play the simple mode easily, practice in the normal mode, and finally challenge the hard mode!

Score leaderboard
Try to get a higher score and leave your name on the leaderboard!

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 烏克蘭文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 捷克文, 日文, 波蘭文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 韓文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel core i3
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GT640
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
